context.title: Repository and Credentials
context.description: Specify the URL of the Git repository you want to link. If the repository is private, provide your username and password or personal access token.

context.title: Branch and Package Selection
context.description: Select the branch of the repository and the target ABAP package where the repository objects will be placed.

context.title: Folder Logic Selection
context.description: Select the folder logic to use when linking the repository. PREFIX logic requires sub-package names to contain the parent package name as a prefix. FULL folder logic accepts any package name.

context.title: Package Dependency Resolution
context.description: Verify all APACK dependencies and specify local packages for them. All dependent repositories must have valid package assignments with the same transport layer.

context.title: Object Selection for Pull
context.description: Select the objects that should be pulled from the remote repository. Only selected objects will be overwritten with the remote version.

context.title: Switch Branch - Credentials
context.description: If the repository is private, provide your credentials to authenticate before switching branches.

context.title: Switch Branch - Branch Selection
context.description: Select the target branch to switch to for this repository.
